channel.title: Stigs on Hardware Hacking Laboratory
channel.description: Recent content in Stigs on Hardware Hacking Laboratory

item.title: New Technical Guide: Secure update of embedded systems
item.description: Publication of a new STIG guide on microcontroller dual-bank based secure upgrade

item.title: New Technical Guide: Physical Memory Protection for Embedded Systems
item.description: Publication of a new STIG guide on microcontroller memory protection and the use of the MPU as a defensible security control.
